ModMetaData.name: RimDoctor
ModMetaData.author: tyler
ModMetaData.description:
RimDoctor — a smart in-game mod manager + load/texture/log doctor.
• Auto-sorts your load order using dependency rules + a community rules database, then writes ModsConfig.xml and offers a restart. • Scans for broken content (missing textures, bad def paths, incomplete mod downloads) and shows a clear health report. • Prevents missing-texture crashes at runtime by substituting a generated placeholder for any texture that fails to load. • Reads the live error log and explains it in plain language — what it means, the likely culprit mod, and a suggested fix. • Repairs problems across three tiers: report-only, safe auto-fixes, and maximum (via a generated local override mod — never by editing Workshop files).
RimDoctor fails safe: if it errors, it disables the affected feature and never blocks the game from loading.
